languages.original_text: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

languages.text: "Ни живы, ни мертвы, все так, только вот с чего ты возомнила, что надо их обязательно добивать, а, черепушка?"
"Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

"Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

languages.text: 「死んでない、生きてない、そうだな…でも、絶対に殺さなきゃいけないって、どこで聞いたんだ、スカリー？」
languages.original_text: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

traits.locale_text: 「死んでない、生きてない、そうだな…でも、絶対に殺さなきゃいけないって、どこで聞いたんだ、スカリー？」

languages.text: « C'est vrai qu'elles ne sont ni vraiment vivantes ni vraiment mortes... mais qu'est-ce qui vous fait croire que vous devez absolument les achever, Morticia ? »
languages.original_text: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

traits.locale_text: « C'est vrai qu'elles ne sont ni vraiment vivantes ni vraiment mortes... mais qu'est-ce qui vous fait croire que vous devez absolument les achever, Morticia ? »

languages.text: "Nicht wirklich tot oder lebendig, richtig ... aber wie kommt Ihr darauf, dass Ihr sie unbedingt töten müsst, Schädelchen?"
languages.original_text: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

traits.locale_text: "Nicht wirklich tot oder lebendig, richtig ... aber wie kommt Ihr darauf, dass Ihr sie unbedingt töten müsst, Schädelchen?"

languages.text: "Ne tam ölü ne de tam canlı, doğru... Ancak onları kesinlikle haklaman gerektiği fikrine nereden kapıldın?"
languages.original_text: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

traits.locale_text: "Ne tam ölü ne de tam canlı, doğru... Ancak onları kesinlikle haklaman gerektiği fikrine nereden kapıldın?"

languages.text: «No están muertos, tampoco viven... ¿pero de dónde te sacas la idea de que no queda otra que acabar con ellos, calavera?».
languages.original_text: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"

traits.locale_text: «No están muertos, tampoco viven... ¿pero de dónde te sacas la idea de que no queda otra que acabar con ellos, calavera?».

languages.text: “半死不活，是吧……但是什么让你觉得非得把它们彻底了结才行，骷髅姑娘？”
languages.original_text: "Not quite dead, not quite alive, right... but where'd you get the idea that you absolutely have to finish them off, eh, Skully?"
